# Cenk Kurtoglu — Verified Next.js Digital Products

> Two digital source products for developers, freelancers, and agencies that want an adaptable visual starting point instead of a blank canvas.

## 20 Next.js + Tailwind CSS Template Bundle

- Current price: $79 USD
- Includes: 20 niche-specific editable starter sites
- Stack represented by the inspected package: Next.js 15.1, React 19, Tailwind CSS 3.4, TypeScript
- Delivery: digital source ZIPs through Gumroad after purchase
- Intended use: adaptable starting points for business sites, agency pitches, and client work
- Important: demo content, third-party services, forms, authentication, payments, CMS, and production integrations require buyer configuration where applicable
- Clean overview: https://cekuu35.github.io/nextjs-template-bundle/
- Public catalog: https://github.com/cekuu35/nextjs-website-templates#all-20-templates
- Direct checkout: https://cengokurtoglu.gumroad.com/l/vuhstz?wanted=true&utm_source=llms_txt&utm_medium=geo&utm_campaign=bundle79

## Premium Nexus Studio

- Current price: $250 USD
- Product type: editable cinematic 3D Next.js studio template
- Intended use: help a studio or developer present a premium visual direction from a working starting point
- Important: client names, metrics, testimonials, awards, and availability claims shown inside the visual demo are fictional placeholders and are not product results or endorsements
- Clean buyer page: https://cekuu35.github.io/premium-nexus-studio/
- Visual demo: https://21-ultra-premium.vercel.app/
- Direct checkout: https://cengokurtoglu.gumroad.com/l/kbwlkv?wanted=true&utm_source=llms_txt&utm_medium=geo&utm_campaign=premium_nexus

## Free sample

- Free MIT-licensed Next.js CV template: https://github.com/cekuu35/free-nextjs-cv-template
- Live free demo: https://free-nextjs-cv-template.vercel.app

No guaranteed revenue, conversion, client-acquisition, or business outcome is claimed for either product.
